note: Router outputs in out/<id>.json (produced by subagents executing the router skill). judgeScore from an independent LLM-judge scoring routing appropriateness; code grade is manifest validity + expected-role coverage (eval/router/grade.mjs).

cases.judgeReason: Real implement+test-author providers, TDD plan, security-review bonus.
Security auditor + remediation + regression tests + verify gate; review fan-out via tournament.
Author + humanize ending, SEO bonus, no software roles.
Failure-first reproduce/root-cause before fix, regression test + full-suite verify.
Refactor provider, characterization baseline, behavior-preservation, scoped diff review.
Research + docs-research providers, evidence via context7, cited recommendation doc.

Schema/UI/copy/OAuth tasks each carry the correct skill binding and surface tag with distinct rationale+evidence; the ai-sdk stack gap is flagged in degradations with a recommendation, not silently dropped.
